scripts.quality:playwright: start-server-and-test "npx --yes serve@14 publish/wwwroot -l 5234 -s" http-get://127.0.0.1:5234 "npm run quality:layout-shifts && npm run quality:axe"
scripts.quality:local: dotnet publish Yoga.Client/Yoga.Client.csproj -c Release -o publish --nologo && npm run quality:prep-lhci && npm run quality:playwright
